CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.name: LOW ANGLE
CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.prompt: Low-angle shot: camera positioned below eye level, looking up at the subject. Creates a sense of power, dominance, and monumentality. appears larger, more imposing against the background.

CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.name: HIGH ANGLE
CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.prompt: High-angle shot: camera positioned above eye level, looking down at the subject. Creates vulnerability, smallness, or overview perspective. Subject appears diminished or subordinate in the frame.

CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.name: EYE LEVEL
CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.prompt: Eye-level shot: camera positioned at the subject's eye height, creating neutral, natural perspective. Establishes equality and realism, neither empowering nor diminishing the subject.

CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.name: EXTREME LOW ANGLE
CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.prompt: Extreme low-angle shot: camera positioned very close to ground level, looking sharply upward. Creates dramatic scale distortion, towering effect, and powerful sense of dominance or intimidation.

CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.name: EXTREME HIGH ANGLE
CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.prompt: Extreme high-angle shot: camera positioned far above subject, looking steeply downward. Creates isolation, vulnerability, or god's-eye perspective. Subject appears tiny within vast environment.

CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.name: WORM-EYE VIEW
CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.prompt: View from below the subject, worm's-eye perspective, camera close to ground, looking up. Exaggerated scale, low-angle composition, emphasizing height and dominance of the subject.

CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.name: BIRD-EYE VIEW
CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.prompt: Mild aerial viewpoint: the camera is placed above the subject, angled downward to create a clear bird's-eye view without distortion.

CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.name: DUTCH ANGLE
CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.prompt: Mild Dutch camera angle: the camera is intentionally tilted off-balance on the roll axis, giving the composition a diagonal, dynamic feel, but with only a small tilt—not a full rotation.

CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.name: DUTCH TILT
CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.prompt: Dutch tilt composition: camera rolled on its axis, creating slanted horizon line and diagonal perspective. Generates tension, disorientation, or psychological unease in the frame.

CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.name: CANTED ANGLE
CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.prompt: Canted angle shot: camera tilted sideways off horizontal axis, creating oblique composition. Conveys instability, tension, or dynamic energy through off-kilter framing.

CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.name: OVERHEAD ANGLE
CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.prompt: Overhead shot: camera positioned directly above subject, pointing straight down. Creates flat, graphic composition showing spatial relationships and patterns from above.

CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.name: TOP-DOWN ANGLE
CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.prompt: Top-down perspective: camera looking directly downward onto subject from above. Emphasizes layout, arrangement, and spatial design with flattened perspective.

CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.name: OBLIQUE ANGLE
CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.prompt: Oblique angle shot: camera positioned at diagonal angle to subject, neither parallel nor perpendicular. Creates depth, dimension, and dynamic three-dimensional perspective.

CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.name: SIDE ANGLE
CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.prompt: Side-angle shot: camera positioned perpendicular to subject, capturing pure profile view. Emphasizes silhouette, outline, and lateral dimension of subject.

CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.name: FRONT ANGLE
CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.prompt: Front-facing angle: camera positioned directly in front of subject, creating symmetrical frontal view. Establishes direct confrontation, intimacy, or formal presentation.

CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.name: BACK ANGLE
CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.prompt: Back-angle shot: camera positioned behind subject, showing rear view. Creates mystery, anonymity, or shares subject's perspective of what lies ahead.

CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.name: THREE-QUARTER ANGLE
CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.prompt: Three-quarter angle shot: camera positioned at 45-degree angle to subject, showing both front and side. Creates depth, dimensionality, and natural, flattering perspective.

CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.name: PROFILE ANGLE
CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.prompt: Profile shot: camera capturing subject from pure side view, showing complete silhouette. Emphasizes facial features, body contour, and outline against background.

CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.name: DIAGONAL ANGLE
CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.prompt: Strong diagonal layout: the composition positions the subject along a bold diagonal path, enhancing energy and flow within the frame.

CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.name: TILT-UP ANGLE
CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.prompt: Tilt-up composition: camera angled upward from lower position, gradually revealing subject from bottom to top. Creates anticipation, grandeur, or revealing movement.

CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.name: TILT-DOWN ANGLE
CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.prompt: Tilt-down composition: camera angled downward from higher position, showing subject from top descending. Creates survey, assessment, or descending perspective.

CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.name: POV ANGLE
CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.prompt: Point-of-view shot: camera positioned to replicate exact perspective of a character's eyes. Creates immersive, subjective experience of seeing through character's viewpoint.

CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.name: REVERSE POV ANGLE
CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.prompt: Reverse POV shot: camera showing what is looking at the POV character. Reveals the subject of character's gaze, completing visual conversation between perspectives.

CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.name: BACK-TO-CAMERA ANGLE
CAMERA ANGLES & ORIENTATIONS.prompt: Back-to-camera shot: subject positioned with back toward camera, facing away. Creates anonymity, contemplation, or shares subject's forward-looking perspective.

CAMERA SHOTS (FRAMING / DISTANCE).name: EXTREME WIDE SHOT
CAMERA SHOTS (FRAMING / DISTANCE).prompt: Extreme wide shot: camera positioned very far from subject, showing vast environment. Subject appears small within expansive landscape, emphasizing scale and context.

CAMERA SHOTS (FRAMING / DISTANCE).name: WIDE SHOT
CAMERA SHOTS (FRAMING / DISTANCE).prompt: Wide shot: camera captures subject fully within environment, showing complete body and surrounding space. Establishes location, context, and spatial relationships.

CAMERA SHOTS (FRAMING / DISTANCE).name: LONG SHOT
CAMERA SHOTS (FRAMING / DISTANCE).prompt: Long shot: camera positioned at distance showing full subject from head to toe with surrounding space. Balances subject presence with environmental context.

CAMERA SHOTS (FRAMING / DISTANCE).name: FULL BODY SHOT
CAMERA SHOTS (FRAMING / DISTANCE).prompt: Full body shot: camera framing captures subject's entire body from head to feet. Shows complete physical presence, posture, and body language within frame.

CAMERA SHOTS (FRAMING / DISTANCE).name: MEDIUM LONG SHOT
CAMERA SHOTS (FRAMING / DISTANCE).prompt: Medium long shot: camera frames subject from approximately knees upward. Often called "cowboy shot," balancing body language visibility with facial detail.

CAMERA SHOTS (FRAMING / DISTANCE).name: MEDIUM SHOT
CAMERA SHOTS (FRAMING / DISTANCE).prompt: Medium shot: camera frames subject from waist up, showing torso, arms, and head. Balances facial expression with body language and gestures.

CAMERA SHOTS (FRAMING / DISTANCE).name: MEDIUM CLOSE-UP
CAMERA SHOTS (FRAMING / DISTANCE).prompt: Medium close-up shot: camera frames subject from chest upward, emphasizing face while including shoulders. Intimate yet maintaining some physical context.

CAMERA SHOTS (FRAMING / DISTANCE).name: CLOSE-UP
CAMERA SHOTS (FRAMING / DISTANCE).prompt: Close-up: the camera is positioned very near the subject, capturing all subject in the frame.

CAMERA SHOTS (FRAMING / DISTANCE).name: EXTREME CLOSE-UP
CAMERA SHOTS (FRAMING / DISTANCE).prompt: Extreme close-up shot: camera frames very tight on specific detail—eyes, mouth, hands, or object. Creates intense intimacy, emphasis, or dramatic focus.

CAMERA SHOTS (FRAMING / DISTANCE).name: MACRO SHOT
CAMERA SHOTS (FRAMING / DISTANCE).prompt: Macro shot: camera with macro lens positioned extremely close to small subject, revealing minute details invisible to naked eye. Creates abstract, detailed, magnified perspective.

CAMERA SHOTS (FRAMING / DISTANCE).name: COWBOY SHOT
CAMERA SHOTS (FRAMING / DISTANCE).prompt: Cowboy shot: camera frames subject from mid-thigh upward, traditionally showing gunbelt in Western films. Emphasizes stance, readiness, and body language.

CAMERA SHOTS (FRAMING / DISTANCE).name: KNEE SHOT
CAMERA SHOTS (FRAMING / DISTANCE).prompt: Knee shot: camera frames subject from knees upward, showing most of body while maintaining facial detail. Provides strong sense of physical presence.

CAMERA SHOTS (FRAMING / DISTANCE).name: SHOULDER SHOT
CAMERA SHOTS (FRAMING / DISTANCE).prompt: Shoulder shot: camera frames subject from shoulders up, focusing on face and upper torso. Creates intimacy while maintaining personal space boundary.

CAMERA SHOTS (FRAMING / DISTANCE).name: BUST SHOT
CAMERA SHOTS (FRAMING / DISTANCE).prompt: Bust shot: camera frames subject from chest upward, capturing head, neck, and upper torso. Classic portrait framing emphasizing facial expression and upper body.

CAMERA SHOTS (FRAMING / DISTANCE).name: HEADSHOT
CAMERA SHOTS (FRAMING / DISTANCE).prompt: Headshot: camera tightly frames subject's head and face, filling frame from top of head to just below chin. Maximum facial detail and emotional intimacy.

CAMERA SHOTS (FRAMING / DISTANCE).name: TIGHT SHOT
CAMERA SHOTS (FRAMING / DISTANCE).prompt: Tight shot: camera framed extremely close to subject with minimal surrounding space. Creates claustrophobic, intense, or highly focused composition.

COMPOSITION-STYLE SHOT TAGS.name: CENTERED COMPOSITION
COMPOSITION-STYLE SHOT TAGS.prompt: Centered composition: subject positioned in exact center of frame, creating symmetrical, balanced, formal arrangement. Emphasizes subject importance and stability.

COMPOSITION-STYLE SHOT TAGS.name: RULE-OF-THIRDS COMPOSITION
COMPOSITION-STYLE SHOT TAGS.prompt: Rule-of-thirds composition: frame divided into 3x3 grid, subject positioned along gridlines or intersections. Creates balanced, natural, visually pleasing arrangement.

COMPOSITION-STYLE SHOT TAGS.name: SYMMETRICAL SHOT
COMPOSITION-STYLE SHOT TAGS.prompt: Symmetrical shot: composition with balanced elements mirrored on either side of central axis. Creates harmony, formality, and aesthetic perfection.

COMPOSITION-STYLE SHOT TAGS.name: ASYMMETRICAL SHOT
COMPOSITION-STYLE SHOT TAGS.prompt: Asymmetrical shot: composition with unbalanced element distribution, creating visual tension. Generates dynamic interest through intentional imbalance.

COMPOSITION-STYLE SHOT TAGS.name: MINIMALIST SHOT
COMPOSITION-STYLE SHOT TAGS.prompt: Minimalist shot: composition with minimal elements, abundant empty space, simple forms. Emphasizes subject through reduction and negative space.

COMPOSITION-STYLE SHOT TAGS.name: BUSY COMPOSITION
COMPOSITION-STYLE SHOT TAGS.prompt: Busy composition: frame filled with multiple elements, details, and visual information. Creates complexity, energy, or overwhelming sensory experience.

COMPOSITION-STYLE SHOT TAGS.name: NEGATIVE SPACE SHOT
COMPOSITION-STYLE SHOT TAGS.prompt: Negative space shot: composition emphasizing empty areas around subject, using emptiness as design element. Creates isolation, focus, or breathing room.

COMPOSITION-STYLE SHOT TAGS.name: LEADING LINES SHOT
COMPOSITION-STYLE SHOT TAGS.prompt: Leading lines composition: visual lines within frame guide viewer's eye toward subject. Creates depth, direction, and purposeful visual flow.

COMPOSITION-STYLE SHOT TAGS.name: FOREGROUND FRAMING SHOT
COMPOSITION-STYLE SHOT TAGS.prompt: Foreground framing shot: elements in foreground create natural frame around subject. Adds depth, context, and directs attention to main subject.

COMPOSITION-STYLE SHOT TAGS.name: OVER-THE-SHOULDER SHOT
COMPOSITION-STYLE SHOT TAGS.prompt: Over-the-shoulder shot: camera positioned behind one subject's shoulder, looking toward another. Creates conversational perspective and spatial relationship.

COMPOSITION-STYLE SHOT TAGS.name: REACTION SHOT
COMPOSITION-STYLE SHOT TAGS.prompt: Reaction shot: camera captures subject responding to off-screen action or dialogue. Emphasizes emotional response and character perspective.

COMPOSITION-STYLE SHOT TAGS.name: TWO-SHOT
COMPOSITION-STYLE SHOT TAGS.prompt: Two-shot: camera frames two subjects within same composition. Establishes relationship, interaction, or comparison between characters.

COMPOSITION-STYLE SHOT TAGS.name: THREE-SHOT
COMPOSITION-STYLE SHOT TAGS.prompt: Three-shot: camera frames three subjects within composition, showing group dynamic. Creates triangular visual relationship and social interaction.

COMPOSITION-STYLE SHOT TAGS.name: GROUP SHOT
COMPOSITION-STYLE SHOT TAGS.prompt: Group shot: camera captures multiple subjects arranged together in frame. Emphasizes collective presence, community, or ensemble dynamic.

MOVEMENT-RELATED CAMERA SHOTS.name: TRACKING SHOT
MOVEMENT-RELATED CAMERA SHOTS.prompt: Tracking shot aesthetic: composition suggesting camera movement following subject laterally. Creates dynamic sense of motion, pursuit, or accompaniment.

MOVEMENT-RELATED CAMERA SHOTS.name: DOLLY SHOT
MOVEMENT-RELATED CAMERA SHOTS.prompt: Dolly shot style: composition implying camera physically moving toward or away from subject on track. Creates smooth approach or retreat with depth change.

MOVEMENT-RELATED CAMERA SHOTS.name: CRN-SHOT
MOVEMENT-RELATED CAMERA SHOTS.prompt: Crane shot perspective: composition suggesting camera positioned on crane, capable of sweeping vertical and horizontal movement. Creates grand, elevated, cinematic perspective.

MOVEMENT-RELATED CAMERA SHOTS.name: BOOM SHOT
MOVEMENT-RELATED CAMERA SHOTS.prompt: Boom shot style: composition implying camera on boom arm, moving vertically. Creates rising or lowering perspective with dramatic reveal.

MOVEMENT-RELATED CAMERA SHOTS.name: ZOOM SHOT
MOVEMENT-RELATED CAMERA SHOTS.prompt: Zoom shot aesthetic: composition suggesting focal length change, appearing to move closer or farther. Creates intensity increase or dramatic distance change.

MOVEMENT-RELATED CAMERA SHOTS.name: PUSH-IN SHOT
MOVEMENT-RELATED CAMERA SHOTS.prompt: Push-in composition: framing suggesting camera moving steadily closer to subject. Creates building tension, intimacy, or focused attention.

MOVEMENT-RELATED CAMERA SHOTS.name: PULL-BACK SHOT
MOVEMENT-RELATED CAMERA SHOTS.prompt: Pull-back composition: framing suggesting camera moving away from subject, revealing context. Creates revelation, scope expansion, or isolation.

MOVEMENT-RELATED CAMERA SHOTS.name: PAN SHOT
MOVEMENT-RELATED CAMERA SHOTS.prompt: Pan shot style: composition implying horizontal camera rotation across scene. Creates sweeping survey, landscape revelation, or spatial exploration.

MOVEMENT-RELATED CAMERA SHOTS.name: TILT SHOT
MOVEMENT-RELATED CAMERA SHOTS.prompt: Tilt shot aesthetic: composition suggesting vertical camera rotation, scanning up or down. Creates height revelation or vertical space exploration.

MOVEMENT-RELATED CAMERA SHOTS.name: ARC SHOT
MOVEMENT-RELATED CAMERA SHOTS.prompt: Arc shot composition: framing suggesting camera moving in curved path around subject. Creates dimensional reveal, dynamic perspective, and circular motion.

MOVEMENT-RELATED CAMERA SHOTS.name: 360-DEGREE SHOT
MOVEMENT-RELATED CAMERA SHOTS.prompt: 360-degree perspective: composition implying complete circular camera path around subject. Creates comprehensive spatial understanding and dynamic rotation.

MOVEMENT-RELATED CAMERA SHOTS.name: STATIC SHOT
MOVEMENT-RELATED CAMERA SHOTS.prompt: Static shot: camera fixed in single position without movement. Creates stability, observation, and deliberate, contemplative framing.

LENS / PERSPECTIVE TYPE.name: WIDE-ANGLE SHOT
LENS / PERSPECTIVE TYPE.prompt: Wide-angle lens shot: composition showing expanded field of view with slight barrel distortion. Exaggerates space, depth, and environmental scope.

LENS / PERSPECTIVE TYPE.name: ULTRA-WIDE SHOT
LENS / PERSPECTIVE TYPE.prompt: Ultra-wide lens shot: composition with extremely expanded field of view and pronounced barrel distortion. Creates dramatic spatial exaggeration and immersive perspective.

LENS / PERSPECTIVE TYPE.name: FISHEYE SHOT
LENS / PERSPECTIVE TYPE.prompt: Fisheye lens shot: composition with spherical distortion creating circular, bulging perspective. Dramatically warps space, creating surreal, immersive viewpoint.

LENS / PERSPECTIVE TYPE.name: TELEPHOTO SHOT
LENS / PERSPECTIVE TYPE.prompt: Telephoto lens shot: composition with compressed perspective, flattened depth, and narrow field of view. Creates isolated subject with beautifully blurred background.

LENS / PERSPECTIVE TYPE.name: PORTRAIT-LENS SHOT
LENS / PERSPECTIVE TYPE.prompt: Portrait-lens shot: composition with shallow depth of field, subject sharp against softly blurred background. Creates pleasing bokeh and subject isolation.

LENS / PERSPECTIVE TYPE.name: MACRO-LENS SHOT
LENS / PERSPECTIVE TYPE.prompt: Macro-lens shot: composition capturing extreme detail of small subject at very close range. Reveals microscopic textures and details with minimal depth of field.

LENS / PERSPECTIVE TYPE.name: TILT-SHIFT SHOT
LENS / PERSPECTIVE TYPE.prompt: Tilt-shift lens shot: composition with selective focus plane, creating miniature effect or corrected perspective. Produces dreamy, toy-like, or architecturally corrected view.

LENS / PERSPECTIVE TYPE.name: ANAMORPHIC SHOT
LENS / PERSPECTIVE TYPE.prompt: Anamorphic lens shot: composition with characteristic wide aspect ratio, horizontal lens flares, and oval bokeh. Creates cinematic, premium visual aesthetic.

SPECIAL POV / PERSPECTIVE.name: FIRST-PERSON SHOT
SPECIAL POV / PERSPECTIVE.prompt: First-person perspective: camera represents character's own eyes, showing what they see. Creates immersive, subjective experience of being the character.

SPECIAL POV / PERSPECTIVE.name: THIRD-PERSON SHOT
SPECIAL POV / PERSPECTIVE.prompt: Third-person perspective: camera observing subject from outside their body. Creates objective viewpoint watching character from external position.

SPECIAL POV / PERSPECTIVE.name: OBJECT POV SHOT
SPECIAL POV / PERSPECTIVE.prompt: Object POV shot: camera positioned at perspective of inanimate object, showing scene from object's "viewpoint." Creates unusual, creative perspective.

SPECIAL POV / PERSPECTIVE.name: DRONE SHOT
SPECIAL POV / PERSPECTIVE.prompt: Drone shot perspective: elevated aerial view with smooth, floating quality. Creates sweeping, bird's-eye perspective with contemporary aesthetic.

SPECIAL POV / PERSPECTIVE.name: SVC
SPECIAL POV / PERSPECTIVE.prompt: Surveillance camera angle: high-corner mounted perspective with wide-angle distortion, timestamp overlay aesthetic. Creates voyeuristic, security monitoring viewpoint.

SPECIAL POV / PERSPECTIVE.name: SECURITY CAM ANGLE
SPECIAL POV / PERSPECTIVE.prompt: Security cam perspective: fixed high-angle viewpoint with grainy quality, suggesting CCTV footage. Creates documentary, monitoring, or found-footage aesthetic.

SPECIAL POV / PERSPECTIVE.name: DASHCAM ANGLE
SPECIAL POV / PERSPECTIVE.prompt: Dashcam perspective: forward-facing view from vehicle dashboard, showing road ahead. Creates point-of-view from driver's position with characteristic wide angle.

SPECIAL POV / PERSPECTIVE.name: VINTAGE FILM FILTER
SPECIAL POV / PERSPECTIVE.prompt: subtle warm tones, soft grain, gentle contrast, slightly faded colors, classic analog film look

SPECIAL POV / PERSPECTIVE.name: COOL CINEMATIC FILTER
SPECIAL POV / PERSPECTIVE.prompt: clean teal-and-neutral tones, smooth contrast, soft shadows, modern cinematic color grading, no added objects

SPECIAL POV / PERSPECTIVE.name: MSC-POV
SPECIAL POV / PERSPECTIVE.prompt: Microscope viewpoint: extreme magnification showing microscopic details with circular vignette. Creates scientific, detailed perspective of tiny subjects.

SPECIAL POV / PERSPECTIVE.name: TSC-POV
SPECIAL POV / PERSPECTIVE.prompt: Telescope viewpoint: distant view through circular vignette, showing magnified far-away subjects. Creates astronomical, surveillance, or distant observation perspective.
